features.name: division by zero produces x undef
features.description: Code should include integer division where the divisor is a variable that can be zero, so that the result is X (undef) at runtime

features.name: power operator x-propagation from undef exponent
features.description: Code should include a power operator ** where the exponent operand is or can be X (undef), and verify the result is also X rather than a concrete value

features.name: chained x-propagation through division-into-power-operator
features.description: Code should include a chain where integer division by a zero variable produces X and that X value is used as the exponent of the power operator **, requiring X to propagate end-to-end
